title: Retro Synthwave Bikini Group
promptText: A hyperrealistic, 1980s-inspired synthwave album cover art depicting a group of bikini-clad women on a tropical beach, fully embracing the retro-futuristic, neon-soaked aesthetic of the synthwave genre. The scene exudes nostalgic vibes, combining the vibrant colors of a synthwave sunset with a tropical paradise. Scene Description: The artwork shows four to five stylish, 1980s-inspired bikini girls lounging and enjoying themselves on a tropical beach under a glowing neon sunset.
